x_post.when: showing a real X/Twitter post (the receipt, the plagiarist's post, the reply)

reddit_post.when: showing a real Reddit post/comment thread

notes: Overlay-native blocks (yt-lower-third, macos-notification) render transparent-body alpha and composite directly. Post-card blocks are data-patched with the REAL post text/handle (never fabricated) and rendered full-frame opaque as the receipt. Bespoke broadcast lower-thirds cover the rest.
